html:
Provider Configuration

LoongClaw supports 30+ LLM providers with unified configuration.

Basic Configuration

[provider]
kind = "openai"
model = "gpt-4o-mini"
api_key_env = "OPENAI_API_KEY"

Provider Options

Option Type Default Description
kind string "openai" Provider type
model string "auto" Model ID to use
api_key string - API key (inline, not recommended)
api_key_env string - Environment variable for API key
base_url string Provider default API base URL
chat_completions_path string /v1/chat/completions API path
temperature number 0.2 Sampling temperature (0.0-2.0)
max_tokens number - Maximum tokens to generate
request_timeout_ms number 30000 Request timeout in milliseconds

Supported Providers

Provider kind Value API Key Env Variable
OpenAI openai OPENAI_API_KEY
Anthropic anthropic ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
Google Gemini gemini GEMINI_API_KEY
DeepSeek deepseek DEEPSEEK_API_KEY
Kimi/Moonshot kimi MOONSHOT_API_KEY
Groq groq GROQ_API_KEY
Mistral mistral MISTRAL_API_KEY
OpenRouter openrouter OPENROUTER_API_KEY
xAI xai XAI_API_KEY
Zhipu zhipu ZHIPUAI_API_KEY
Ollama ollama -
AWS Bedrock bedrock AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK
Cerebras cerebras CEREBRAS_API_KEY
Cohere cohere COHERE_API_KEY
Fireworks fireworks FIREWORKS_API_KEY
Minimax minimax MINIMAX_API_KEY
Nvidia nvidia NVIDIA_API_KEY
Perplexity perplexity PERPLEXITY_API_KEY
Together together TOGETHER_API_KEY
Volcengine volcengine VOLCENGINE_API_KEY
Qwen/DashScope qwen DASHSCOPE_API_KEY
Qianfan/Baidu qianfan QIANFAN_API_KEY
SiliconFlow siliconflow SILICONFLOW_API_KEY
StepFun stepfun STEP_API_KEY
Venice venice VENICE_API_KEY
Novita novita NOVITA_API_KEY
SambaNova sambanova SAMBANOVA_API_KEY
Vercel AI Gateway vercel_ai_gateway AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY
BytePlus byteplus BYTEPLUS_API_KEY
Cloudflare AI Gateway cloudflare_ai_gateway CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY

Provider Examples

OpenAI

[provider]
kind = "openai"
model = "gpt-4o"
api_key_env = "OPENAI_API_KEY"
temperature = 0.7

Anthropic

[provider]
kind = "anthropic"
model = "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022"
api_key_env = "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"

DeepSeek

[provider]
kind = "deepseek"
model = "deepseek-chat"
api_key_env = "DEEPSEEK_API_KEY"

Kimi (Moonshot)

[provider]
kind = "kimi"
model = "moonshot-v1-8k"
api_key_env = "MOONSHOT_API_KEY"
base_url = "https://api.moonshot.cn"

Volcengine

[provider]
kind = "volcengine"
model = "your-model-id"
api_key_env = "ARK_API_KEY"
base_url = "https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com"
chat_completions_path = "/api/v3/chat/completions"

Ollama (Local)

[provider]
kind = "ollama"
model = "llama3"
base_url = "http://localhost:11434"

OpenRouter

[provider]
kind = "openrouter"
model = "anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet"
api_key_env = "OPENROUTER_API_KEY"

Retry Configuration

Configure retry behavior for API requests:

[provider]
retry_max_attempts = 3
retry_initial_backoff_ms = 300
retry_max_backoff_ms = 3000
Option Default Description
retry_max_attempts 3 Maximum retry attempts
retry_initial_backoff_ms 300 Initial backoff in ms
retry_max_backoff_ms 3000 Maximum backoff in ms

Custom Headers

Add custom headers to API requests:

[provider.headers]
X-Custom-Header = "value"
X-Request-Source = "loongclaw"

Reasoning Effort

For models that support reasoning (like o1):

[provider]
reasoning_effort = "medium"  # none, minimal, low, medium, high, xhigh

Tool Schema Mode

Control how tools are presented to the model:

[provider]
tool_schema_mode = "provider_default"  # provider_default, disabled, enabled_strict, enabled_with_downgrade

Model Catalog

Configure model catalog caching:

[provider]
model_catalog_cache_ttl_ms = 30000
model_catalog_stale_if_error_ms = 120000
model_catalog_cache_max_entries = 32

Multiple Provider Profiles

Define multiple providers and switch between them:

[providers.main]
kind = "openai"
model = "gpt-4o"
api_key_env = "OPENAI_API_KEY"
default_for_kind = true

[providers.fallback]
kind = "anthropic"
model = "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022"
api_key_env = "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"

[providers.local]
kind = "ollama"
model = "llama3"
base_url = "http://localhost:11434"

# Select active provider
active_provider = "main"

Environment Variables

Set API keys as environment variables:

# In your shell profile (~/.bashrc, ~/.zshrc, etc.)
export OPENAI_API_KEY="sk-your-key-here"
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="sk-ant-your-key-here"
export DEEPSEEK_API_KEY="sk-your-key-here"

Listing Available Models

Check which models are available from your configured provider:

# Text format
loongclaw list-models

# JSON format
loongclaw list-models --json

Troubleshooting

Invalid API Key

error: provider authentication failed

Solution:

  1. Verify environment variable is set: echo $OPENAI_API_KEY
  2. Check the key is valid and not expired
  3. Ensure the key has correct permissions

Model Not Found

error: model not found: gpt-5

Solution:

  1. Run loongclaw list-models to see available models
  2. Update model in configuration to a valid model ID

Connection Timeout

error: request timeout

Solution:

[provider]
request_timeout_ms = 120000  # Increase timeout to 2 minutes

Rate Limiting

If you encounter rate limits:

[provider]
retry_max_attempts = 5
retry_initial_backoff_ms = 1000
retry_max_backoff_ms = 10000
